content.en:
The passage of the Forbidden Zerg Lair was not very long, and it didn't take long for Ye Tian to pass through the passage and come to the internal space of the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

The internal space of the Zerg lair is very large, and there is no end in sight, even Ye Tian's divine sense can't see the core area, only some forbidden Zerg are shuttling around.

Moreover, the suppression here is very strong, and his strength is at most thirty percent.

I'm afraid that when the half-step domain ancestor comes here, he will also be suppressed a large part of his strength, and at that time, any lord-level forbidden zerg will probably have the strength to kill the half-step domain ancestor.

"You have to be close to the core area to find out the details!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

So, he cast the Heavenly Illusion Divine Step and flew towards the central area of the Forbidden Zerg Lair at the fastest speed.

Along the way, one by one, the taboo zerg besieged Ye Tian, Ye Tian ignored it and let these zergs attack him.

He even burst into the limits of this body's potential, shuttling at a speed beyond the limit.

Finally, he made it to the center with a mortally wounded body.

At this time, his eyes focused on the huge sacred tree inside the lair, and there were countless insect cocoons on the sacred tree, each of which represented a forbidden Zerg.

Ye Tian's divine sense saw the three most important insect cocoons, which were insect cocoons full of golden brilliance, which were the insect cocoons of the lord-level forbidden zerg, if these three insect cocoons were bred, the forbidden bugger would give birth to three lord-level zergs again.

But what made Ye Tian's expression change the most was that there was a pure purple flower on the top of the Zerg God Tree, and there was a pure purple bud on the flower, which was very similar to the insect cocoon, but it was relatively small.

Obviously, this pure purple bud is also a cocoon, and judging by its location, it should be an extremely important cocoon.

Ye Tian could clearly see that the two golden forbidden insects were lying on both sides of the pure purple flowers, as if they were guarding the pure purple insect cocoon.

These two golden forbidden zergs are lord-level forbidden zergs, comparable to half-step domain ancestors!

"Could it be that the insect king cocoon?"

Ye Tian guessed.

If that's the case, that's not good news.

Although he didn't know when the insect king cocoon was born, once it was conceived, it would definitely be a disaster in the Dao Mountain Realm.

Abrupt.

The two lord-level forbidden zergs woke up, and their eyes locked on Ye Tian.

I saw that one of the lord-level forbidden zergs stretched out a long foot, like a spear, instantly piercing the space, directly crossing the void and killing Ye Tian in seconds, and then continued to sleep.

It seems that for them, just a small bug came in and was crushed to death.

----------------

Somewhere in the Dark Forbidden Realm.

Ye Tian was hunting the Forbidden Zerg with Xiao Yue, and his expression changed suddenly, he knew that his copy body had fallen.

The ability to copy the talent is very magical, even the forbidden zerg lair can hardly block the connection between the body and the copy body, so he knows everything that the copy body goes through.

"It's worthy of a lord-level forbidden zerg, and one long foot can easily kill me in seconds!"

Ye Tian muttered in his heart.

However, he quickly became excited.

Before, he followed the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor to get close to the Forbidden Zerg lair, but because he was afraid of the two lord-level forbidden Zerg, the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor did not let his replica body get close to the two-headed lord-level forbidden Zerg.

Due to the distance, the copying talent could not envelop the bodies of the two lord-level forbidden zergs, so they could not see each other's talents.

But this time, the two lord-level forbidden zergs inside the forbidden zerg's lair were relatively close to Ye Tian, so Ye Tian successfully detected the other party's talent.

The normal Forbidden Zerg has no special talents, only speed talents, defense talents, and strength talents, and they don't even have cultivation talents.

Many taboo Zerg have fixed strength as soon as they make a move, and it is difficult to grow, even if they devour more resources, they can only be raised to the current limit.

Therefore, Ye Tian did not copy any good talents from other forbidden zergs.

But this time was different, he actually saw a new talent from the lord-level forbidden zerg.

【Forbidden Talent: Dark Spear】

Ye Tian had never seen any forbidden talents, but judging from the introduction, he knew the general situation of the forbidden talents.

It is a talent that surpasses the Dao-level natal talent, and basically every forbidden creature has a forbidden talent.

But the real forbidden creatures are all existences comparable to domain ancestors, and Ye Tian has no chance to see such forbidden creatures.

But the lord-level forbidden zerg also has a forbidden talent, but it is only a forbidden talent.

The forbidden talents of the two lord-level forbidden zergs are both dark spears, and it is obvious that this is their racial forbidden talent.

Ye Tian copied the forbidden talents of the two lord-level forbidden zergs at once, once they were fused, his forbidden talents were even stronger than the forbidden talents of the lord-level forbidden zergs.

"If I copy the forbidden talents of all lord-level forbidden zergs, I can have an even more powerful forbidden talent: the Dark Spear, but it's a pity that it will be difficult to get in touch with the lord-level forbidden zerg next time!"

Ye Tian said regretfully.

His strength was too weak and too weak, if he didn't have the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor with him, he wouldn't have been able to get close to the Forbidden Zerg Lair, and he would have been killed by those elite-level Forbidden Zerg and Commander-level Forbidden Zerg on the way.

What is even more regrettable for Ye Tian is that he did not detect the talent of the insect king in the pure purple insect cocoon, it should be that the other party has not yet been conceived, so he can't see the talent situation.

Otherwise, the forbidden talent of the generation of insect kings will inevitably be even stronger.

Ye Tian took Xiao Yue to kill the three forbidden zergs, so he didn't continue to kill, but quickly left this area and returned to the base of Black Wind Mountain.

If they are greedy for killing, if they are surrounded by a large number of forbidden zergs, even Ye Tian will not be easy to break through, and if they encounter elite-level taboo zergs, the lives of the two of them will be in danger.

So, take it when you see it!

Back at the base of Black Wind Mountain, Xiao Yue rested first, and Ye Tian was soon received by the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor, obviously the two half-step domain ancestors also returned.

Eternal Dao Ancestor Mansion.

Ye Tian saw the two half-step domain ancestors again: "I've seen the Eternal Dao Ancestor, I've seen the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor!"

The Eternal Dao Ancestor asked, "Nine Extremes Heavenly King, did you find anything when your clone entered the Forbidden Zerg Lair?"

Ye Tian said truthfully: "I have basically explored the situation, and there is another incomparably huge divine tree in the inner center of the forbidden zerg's nest, I call it the forbidden insect tree, there are countless forbidden zerg cocoons on the forbidden insect tree, and each forbidden bug is bred from the forbidden bug cocoon! Moreover, I also saw two living lord-level forbidden zergs, as well as three lord-level forbidden buggers that are being conceived!"

When the Eternal Dao Ancestor and the Divine Ruins Dao Ancestor heard this, their expressions changed slightly.

In this way, the Forbidden Zerg has a total of eight lord-level forbidden zergs, and if those three-headed lord-level forbidden zergs are bred, the number of lord-level taboo bugs of the Forbidden Zerg will reach eleven.

But then, Ye Tian's words made their expressions change greatly.
